title: RestLib Resource Configuration
description: JSON schema for configuring a RestLib REST API resource in appsettings.json.

Name.description: Unique resource name used during registration.

KeyProperty.description: Entity property name used as the primary key. Defaults to 'Id' when omitted.

AllowAnonymousAll.description: When true, all operations allow anonymous access.

Policies.description: Authorization policies required for specific operations. Keys are operation names, values are arrays of policy names.

Filtering.description: Entity property names that can be filtered on via query parameters. Names are automatically converted to snake_case in the query string.

Sorting.description: Entity property names that can be sorted on via the sort query parameter. Names are automatically converted to snake_case.

DefaultSort.description: Default sort expression applied when the client does not provide a sort parameter (e.g. 'name:asc,price:desc'). All referenced fields must also be listed in Sorting.

operationSelection.description: Controls which CRUD operations are enabled. Use either Include or Exclude, not both.

Include.description: Only these operations will be mapped. All others are disabled.

Exclude.description: These operations will not be mapped. All others remain enabled.

Tag.description: Shared tag name for grouping endpoints in the OpenAPI document.

Deprecated.description: Marks all operations as deprecated in the OpenAPI document.

DeprecationMessage.description: Message displayed when the resource is deprecated.

Summaries.description: Short summary text for each operation in the OpenAPI document.

Descriptions.description: Detailed description text for each operation in the OpenAPI document.

rateLimiting.description: Rate limiting policy configuration. Requires the application to register rate limiting policies via AddRateLimiter() and wire the middleware via UseRateLimiter().

Default.description: Default rate limiting policy name applied to all operations. Per-operation overrides and disabled operations take precedence.

ByOperation.description: Per-operation rate limiting policy overrides. Keys are operation names, values are policy names.

hookConfiguration.description: Named hook handlers wired to pipeline stages. Hooks must be registered in C# via AddNamedHook/AddNamedErrorHook before use.

OnRequestReceived.description: Hooks that run when a request is first received.

OnRequestValidated.description: Hooks that run after request validation.

BeforeResponse.description: Hooks that run before the response is sent.

OnError.description: Hooks that run when an exception occurs.

hookStage.description: Configuration for a standard hook pipeline stage.

Default.description: Hook names that always run for this stage, regardless of operation.

ByOperation.description: Hook names that run only for specific operations.

errorHookStage.description: Configuration for the error hook pipeline stage.

Default.description: Error hook names that always run, regardless of operation.

ByOperation.description: Error hook names that run only for specific operations.
